name: GuardDuty Findings Have Notifications Configured
description: GuardDuty findings should be configured to send notifications via SNS, EventBridge, or another alerting mechanism to ensure security team awareness
remediation: Configure EventBridge rules to capture GuardDuty findings and send notifications to SNS topics or other targets
remediation_steps: Navigate to EventBridge in AWS Console
Create a new rule with source 'aws.guardduty'
Select 'GuardDuty Finding' as the event type
Add targets (SNS topic, Lambda, or other notification services)
Alternatively, configure GuardDuty to publish to SNS directly in the GuardDuty settings
